channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Gilgeous-Alexander, Thunder outlast Spurs to reach brink of NBA Finals
item.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander and the Oklahoma City Thunder are a win away from a return to the finals after Game 5 victory.

item.title: Pope appeals for Gaza aid after being asked about flotilla activists
item.description: Pope appeals for Gaza aid after being asked about flotilla activists

item.title: DRC flight suspension and Uganda border curbs isolate Ebola-hit Bunia
item.description: Bunia faces isolation amid Ebola outbreak fears, with airspace closure and Ugandan border curbs adding economic strain.

item.title: Taiwan’s economy is booming thanks to AI. Not everyone sees the benefits
item.description: Taiwan is experiencing explosive GDP growth due to chip exports, but some Taiwanese feel left out.

item.title: How badly is Europe affected by fertiliser shortages due to the Iran war?
item.description: EU launches fertiliser plan as Strait of Hormuz disruption fuels food security fears.

item.title: Iran war day 89: Lebanon strikes kill 31 as ceasefire tensions rise
item.description: Israeli strikes kill 31 in Lebanon as attacks intensify and displacement orders spread.

item.title: ‘Deep suspicion’ of US lingers as Iran ponders agreement to end war
item.description: Iranian officials said the latest US strikes only validated their scepticism and resolve to stand firm on demands.

item.title: ‘No livestock but still hope’: Palestinians prepare for Eid al-Adha in Gaza
item.description: Gaza Palestinians will mark a third Eid under war-like conditions, with a shortage of food and joy.

item.title: ‘Naturally scared’: India’s Muslims denied public spaces for Eid prayers
item.description: Mosques are asking worshippers to pray in shifts, as authorities issue threats against congregations.

item.title: China’s EV exports surge 40 percent in April
item.description: Asia bought the most Chinese EVs of any region, followed by Europe and Latin America, data compiled by Bloomberg shows.

item.title: Israel ‘intensifies’ attacks in Lebanon killing at least 31 people
item.description: At least 31 people have been killed in Israeli attacks across southern Lebanon.

item.title: White House prepares for UFC showdown for Trump’s 80th birthday
item.description: Construction is underway on the South Lawn of the White House in preparation for UFC Freedom 250.

item.title: Trump-backed Paxton topples Senator Cornyn in Texas primary run-off
item.description: Ken Paxton defeats John Cornyn in Texas race, setting up a November election that could decide control of US Senate.

item.title: Group of women and children with alleged ISIL ties returns to Australia
item.description: Australian Federal Police have not made any arrests but say inquiries are ongoing.

item.title: Brazil’s Flavio Bolsonaro meets with Trump amid troubled presidential bid
item.description: Son of former President Jair Bolsonaro is fighting to recover from a scandal that has rocked his presidential campaign.

item.title: How decision-making happens in Iran
item.description: Iran’s negotiators follow a mandate set by the Supreme National Security Council and approved by the Supreme Leader.

item.title: UN chief ‘deeply concerned’ by Moscow plan for Kyiv strikes
item.description: UN Secretary-General Guterres said he was “deeply concerned” after Russia announced plans to strike Ukraine.

item.title: Iran war live: Israel kills 31 in Lebanon; Tehran blasts US truce violation
item.description: Lebanon's Health Ministry reports that Israeli attacks have killed 3,213 people and injured 9,737 since March 2.

item.title: Is the viral ‘Cockroach Janta Party’ a threat to Modi’s government?
item.description: Al Jazeera’s @avawarrinerr explores the rise of the Cockroach Janta Party.

item.title: Chemical tank rupture kills multiple people in US state of Washington
item.description: Several injured people have been transported to hospitals to be treated for chemical burns.

item.title: Aftermath of deadly Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon
item.description: New videos show widespread destruction in Maarakeh following deadly Israeli strikes across southern Lebanon.

item.title: Four people killed after minibus collides with train in Belgium
item.description: The minibus, carrying nine people, drove through closed crossing barriers during the morning rush hour.

item.title: Climber carries kite with Palestinian children’s dreams to Everest summit
item.description: Climber carries kite with Palestinian children’s dreams to Everest summit

item.title: US picks potential partners for using Cold War-era plutonium as fuel
item.description: Trump gov't plans to make about 20 tonnes of plutonium from dismantled nuclear warheads available to US power firms.

item.title: Trump-led push to redraw Congress maps faces setbacks in Southern states
item.description: State lawmakers reject a new map in South Carolina as judges strike down newly drawn US House districts one in Alabama.
